title: Useful Mobs variants
description:
Makes new mob variants more useful and interesting

- New loot tables for mobs
- New loot drop from mobs
- (In future) new game mechanics that will make new loot more valuable
body:
# This mod adds and expands some mechanics with new mobs variants

- New loot tables for mobs
- New loot drop from mobs
- (In future) new game mechanics that will make new loot more valuable
